behaviour: skill-file slimming
absorptionCommand: node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/generated/compile/command-classification.json','utf8')); if(!Array.isArray(c)||c.length!==86) throw new Error('command classification manifest missing full corpus')"

behaviour: workflow splitting into smaller step files
absorptionCommand: node -e "const s=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/generated/compile/workflow-semantics.json','utf8')); if(!Array.isArray(s)||s.length!==84) throw new Error('workflow semantics manifest missing full corpus')"

behaviour: workflow preamble migration into specific split files that need that context
absorptionCommand: node -e "const src=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/advisory/packet.ts','utf8'); if(!src.includes('context')||!src.includes('expectedEvidence')) throw new Error('packet context/evidence contract missing')"

behaviour: skill process extraction into standalone workflow files for debug, reapply-patches, intel, graphify, and workstreams
absorptionCommand: node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/generated/compile/command-classification.json','utf8')); for(const id of ['/gsd-debug','/gsd-reapply-patches','/gsd-intel','/gsd-graphify','/gsd-workstreams']) if(!c.some(e=>e.commandId===id)) throw new Error('missing classification for '+id)"

behaviour: next pointers and obstacle protocol injection
absorptionCommand: node -e "const src=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/advisory/fsm-state.ts','utf8'); if(!src.includes('transitionHistory')||!src.includes('advanceFsmState')) throw new Error('typed transition history contract missing')"

behaviour: post-agent checkpoints
absorptionCommand: node -e "const src=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/advisory/packet.ts','utf8'); if(!src.includes('allowedOutcomes')||!src.includes('reportCommand')) throw new Error('checkpoint/report packet fields missing')"

behaviour: watchdog start injection for full-phase workflows
absorptionCommand: node -e "const p=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/phase-runner.ts','utf8'); const e=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/event-stream.ts','utf8'); if(!p.includes('GSDEventType')||!e.includes('GSDEvent')) throw new Error('runtime lifecycle event surface missing')"

behaviour: watchdog bookends for split workflows such as quick and manager
absorptionCommand: node -e "const s=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/generated/compile/workflow-semantics.json','utf8')); for(const id of ['/workflows/quick','/workflows/manager']) if(!s.some(e=>e.workflowId===id&&e.semantics.some(x=>x.family==='non-blocking-side-effect'||x.family==='parallel-wave'))) throw new Error('missing lifecycle semantics for '+id)"

behaviour: artefact verification
absorptionCommand: node -e "const src=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/compile/packet-contracts.ts','utf8'); if(!src.includes('expectedEvidence')||!src.includes('output artifact')) throw new Error('packet evidence validation missing')"

behaviour: disk-write mandates for the 14 audited agents
absorptionCommand: node -e "const a=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/generated/compile/agent-contracts.json','utf8')); if(a.filter(e=>e.diskWriteMandate).length!==14) throw new Error('expected 14 disk-write mandate agents')"

behaviour: no-force-add git safety
absorptionCommand: node -e "const src=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/compile/packet-contracts.ts','utf8'); if(!src.includes('allowedTools')||!src.includes('diskWriteMandate')) throw new Error('agent safety policy validation missing')"

behaviour: path normalisation
absorptionCommand: node -e "const p=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/compile/paths.ts','utf8'); const h=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/query/helpers.ts','utf8'); if(!p.includes('toRepoRelative')||!h.includes('toPosixPath')) throw new Error('path normalization helpers missing')"

behaviour: cc-clear advance behaviour
absorptionCommand: node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/generated/compile/command-classification.json','utf8')); if(!c.some(e=>e.commandId==='/gsd-progress'||e.commandId==='/gsd-next')) throw new Error('advance runtime integration commands missing')"

behaviour: multi-model enforcement in monolithic and split workflow contexts
absorptionCommand: node -e "const p=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/advisory/provider-availability.ts','utf8'); const q=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/query/fsm-state.ts','utf8'); if(!p.includes('providerConfidence')||!q.includes('missingProviders')) throw new Error('provider fallback metadata missing')"

behaviour: Codex/Gemini routing config and per-step routing distinctions
absorptionCommand: node -e "const src=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/compile/workflow-semantics.ts','utf8'); if(!src.includes('mandatoryProvidersForWorkflow')||!src.includes('agent_routing')) throw new Error('routing provider semantics missing')"

behaviour: Nyquist compliance states and gates
absorptionCommand: node -e "const p=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/phase-runner.ts','utf8'); const v=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/query/validate.ts','utf8'); if(!p.includes('P4Compliance')||!v.includes('Nyquist')) throw new Error('Nyquist P4 compliance surface missing')"

behaviour: config schema/display patches
absorptionCommand: node -e "const s=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/query/config-schema.ts','utf8'); if(!s.includes('agent_routing')||!s.includes('codex_model')||!s.includes('gemini_model')) throw new Error('config schema/display support missing')"

behaviour: schema-translation logic for Codex and Gemini config
absorptionCommand: node -e "const s=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/query/config-schema.ts','utf8'); if(!s.includes('codex_config')||!s.includes('gemini_config')) throw new Error('config translation schema proxy missing')"

behaviour: missing hook restoration
absorptionCommand: node --test tests/install-hooks-copy.test.cjs

behaviour: unknown workflow warnings and compiler coverage for newly introduced upstream workflows
absorptionCommand: node -e "const w=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/generated/compile/workflow-coverage.json','utf8')); const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/generated/compile/command-coverage.json','utf8')); if(!Array.isArray(w)||w.length!==84||!Array.isArray(c)||c.length!==86) throw new Error('coverage manifests missing expected corpus counts')"

behaviour: generated model string refresh
absorptionCommand: node -e "const cfg=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.planning/config.json','utf8')); if(!cfg.codex_model||!cfg.gemini_model||!cfg.agent_routing) throw new Error('generated model/routing config missing')"

behaviour: verify-work normalisation passes
absorptionCommand: node -e "const v=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/query/validate.ts','utf8'); const o=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/query/output.ts','utf8'); if(!v.includes('repairs')||!o.includes('formatQueryOutput')) throw new Error('verification output normalizers missing')"

behaviour: tool-fallback guidance for gsd-sdk and cq --json dependent steps
absorptionCommand: node -e "const q=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/query/index.ts','utf8'); const cli=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/cli.ts','utf8'); if(!q.includes('alias')||!cli.includes('query')) throw new Error('typed query fallback surface missing')"

behaviour: ordering, idempotency, and transactionality protection
absorptionCommand: node -e "const s=require('fs').readFileSync('sdk/src/query/state-mutation.ts','utf8'); if(!s.includes('acquireStateLock')||!s.includes('readModifyWriteStateMd')) throw new Error('atomic state mutation helpers missing')"
